fields.label: Event Type
fields.options:
Created
Updated
Deleted
Merged
Split
Published
Unpublished
Approved
Rejected
Imported
Exported
Enriched
Classified
Validated
WorkflowTransition
AttributeChanged
RelationshipChanged
AssetLinked
AssetUnlinked
Custom
fields.description: Type of event that occurred

fields.label: Event Category
fields.options:
Product
Attribute
Classification
Asset
Channel
Workflow
GoldenRecord
AI
ImportExport
System
User
fields.description: Category of the event for filtering and reporting

fields.label: Event Timestamp
fields.description: When the event occurred

fields.label: Severity
fields.description: Severity level of the event

fields.label: Reference DocType
fields.description: DocType of the document this event relates to

fields.label: Reference Document
fields.description: Document this event relates to

fields.label: Reference Field
fields.description: Specific field that changed (for attribute change events)

fields.label: Parent Event
fields.description: Parent event for hierarchical/batch operations

fields.label: Source System
fields.description: External source system that triggered this event

fields.label: Triggered By
fields.description: User who triggered this event

fields.label: Trigger Method
fields.options:
Manual
API
Import
Scheduler
Webhook
Workflow
AI
System
Document Hook
Batch Operation
fields.description: How this event was triggered

fields.label: Session ID
fields.description: Session identifier for tracing related events

fields.label: Event Summary
fields.description: Human-readable summary of what happened

fields.label: Old Value
fields.description: Previous state/value before the event (JSON format)

fields.label: New Value
fields.description: New state/value after the event (JSON format)

fields.label: Changed Fields
fields.description: List of fields that were modified (JSON array)

fields.label: Event Metadata
fields.description: Additional context data about the event (JSON format)

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Channel context for channel-specific events

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: Locale context for locale-specific events

fields.label: Golden Record
fields.description: Associated golden record for MDM events

fields.label: Workflow State
fields.description: Workflow state at time of event

fields.label: Processed
fields.description: Whether this event has been processed by downstream systems

fields.label: Processed At
fields.description: When this event was processed

fields.label: Webhook Delivered
fields.description: Whether webhook was delivered for this event

fields.label: Delivery Attempts
fields.description: Number of webhook delivery attempts

fields.label: Last Delivery Error
fields.description: Error message from last failed delivery attempt

fields.label: Correlation ID
fields.description: ID for correlating events across systems

fields.label: Causation ID
fields.description: ID of the event that caused this event

fields.label: Batch ID
fields.description: ID for grouping batch operation events

fields.label: Sequence Number
fields.description: Order within a batch of events

fields.label: Is Replayable
fields.description: Whether this event can be replayed for recovery

fields.label: Replayed
fields.description: Whether this is a replayed event

fields.label: Original Event
fields.description: Original event if this is a replay

fields.label: Replay Reason
fields.description: Reason for replaying this event
